title: Paradox Mod Metadata
description: Mod descriptor (metadata) file for VIC3/EU5 (.metadata/metadata.json), located in the .metadata/ subdirectory of the mod root directory.

game_id.description: Identifier of the game this mod targets (e.g. "victoria3", "eu5").

picture.description: Path to the mod thumbnail image (e.g. "thumbnail.png"), relative to the mod root directory.

supported_game_version.description: Game version(s) supported by this mod. Wildcards are allowed (e.g. "*" for any version, "1.8.*" for the 1.8.x series).

short_description.description: Short description text for the mod.

tags.description: List of category tags for the mod (e.g. "Gameplay", "Technologies").

relationships.description: List of relationships between this mod and other mods (e.g. dependencies or conflicts).

game_custom_data.description: Game-specific custom metadata. Content varies by game.

multiplayer_synchronized.description: Whether this mod must be synchronized to all players in multiplayer.

modRelationship.description: A relationship between this mod and another mod (e.g. dependency or conflict).

id.description: Unique identifier of the related mod.
